prompt: ok let me write down something I want to remember: a deadlock is when two threads each hold a resource the other one needs. came up in our incident last week on the payment queue. should connect to our circuit-breaker note from before and maybe to the on-call rotation card.

assertions.description: Exactly one new zettel .md file produced (excluding summary.md and decision-log.md)
Output filename is a kebab-slug like deadlock.md — not date-stamped, not numbered, not stripped of meaning
At least one [[…]] wikilink in the body beyond [[product]] and the Index footer
Body links to either [[circuit-breaker]] or [[on-call-rotation]] — user explicitly named both as related
Body content (excluding frontmatter + footer) is under 300 words
Frontmatter contains both `aliases:` (≥1 entry) and `created:` (ISO date)
Frontmatter does NOT contain `status:` — generic concept cards skip lifecycle
Subjective: the card makes one coherent claim about deadlocks, not multiple unrelated ideas
